SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES C PATE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-23-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-07-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-20-2002 AT 1:30PM. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2002 Continued To Nov-20-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned 250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/20/2002 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)

STATUS CONFERENCE
